g.text: Ratio | L1:RAM = 1:50 | A miss costs 50x more

div.p: 45,678,234 L1-dcache-loads 1,234,567 L1-dcache-load-misses 12,345 LLC-loads 1,234 LLC-load-misses 0.456789 seconds elapsed

g.text: What | Every L1 data cache load
Event | Loads NOT found in L1
What | Load missed L1, fetched from L2/L3/RAM
When | L1 and L2 both missed
Note | L3 is shared across cores
What | Must fetch from main memory
